Info.ToolboxConfigModel: {"entries":[{"content":{"appGalleryLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_e2028a04-7263-4eb8-8406-3fd0cb9f9d41","labelID":"Deployment_ToolboxAppGalleryFiles_e2028a04-7263-4eb8-8406-3fd0cb9f9d41"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"f63faa8a-1c8d-4dd2-a290-ce806b3cb83e"},"authorEmail":"vhtmfu@outlook.com","authorName":"埃博拉酱-机器人","authorOrganization":"一致行动党","description":"自动绘制和调整统计显著性P值线使其位于合理位置\n将文本渲染为二值图像","gettingStartedGuideLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_e2028a04-7263-4eb8-8406-3fd0cb9f9d41","labelID":"Deployment_GettingStartedGuideFile_e2028a04-7263-4eb8-8406-3fd0cb9f9d41"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"caa35d20-0e54-42b6-a5dd-96d91fac7c6a"},"minRelease":"R2025a","outputFileName":"埃博拉酱的计算机视觉工具箱.mltbx","outputFolder":"/","requiredAddons":[{"content":{"addonName":"埃博拉酱的MATLAB扩展","earliestVersion":"20.0.4","latestVersion":"latest","uniqueId":"d0a3672f-3b10-424c-868b-3cb64e588934"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.RequiredAddon","uuid":"6c42c59a-4a5d-4c84-9054-9f3b672bc043"}],"summary":"自动绘制和调整统计显著性P值线使其位于合理位置\n将文本渲染为二值图像","supportedPlatforms":["Windows","Linux","Mac","MatlabOnline"],"toolboxFolder":"/","toolboxImgLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_e2028a04-7263-4eb8-8406-3fd0cb9f9d41","labelID":"Deployment_ToolboxImageFile_e2028a04-7263-4eb8-8406-3fd0cb9f9d41"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"ec67760f-cec1-4b97-a608-d5a3830b8a51"},"toolboxName":"埃博拉酱 的 计算机 视觉 工具箱","toolboxVersion":"1.2.0","uniqueId":"fb2d41b0-8041-4b2d-a69b-9bed4cd34497"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ToolboxConfiguration","uuid":"f72913e8-2a80-4e63-9836-cc4b1bd7b59f"},{"content":{},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectStateValidationIssueList","uuid":"713d9912-2482-45cb-9367-405808663fba"}],"packageUris":["http://schema.mathworks.com/mf0/deployment_toolbox_model/1.0.0"],"version":"1.0"}
